scripts.generate: npm run protocol:generate && npm run adapters:generate && npm run skills:generate
scripts.generate:check: npm run protocol:check && npm run adapters:check && npm run skills:check
scripts.build: npm run generate:check && tsc -b && npm run skills:assets
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test packages/*/test/*.test.ts scripts/*.test.ts && node --import tsx scripts/run-conformance.ts
scripts.test:conformance: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/run-conformance.ts
scripts.benchmark:check: node benchmarks/scripts/generate-dataset.mjs --check && python3 benchmarks/scripts/check-fairness.py && python3 benchmarks/scripts/check-lock.py && python3 -m unittest benchmarks.analysis.test_metric benchmarks.analysis.test_report && python3 -m py_compile benchmarks/analysis/*.py benchmarks/harbor/agents/*.py benchmarks/scripts/*.py
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/package-smoke.ts
scripts.release:check: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/check-publish.ts
